Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 416}I envy you students. It's a new term for you guys.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 416}But for cabbies like me... it's the same thing, year in, year out.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 416}Yeah... Every season, I pick up the guys who miss the last train.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 416}My customers are kids twice as young as me, and then... spring is over.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 416}I'm not feeling bad or nothin', just...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 416}I feel like I've done it all before, you know? Every year...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 416}I couldn't hack it at my last job, since I'm kinda anti-social, so I became a taxi driver. But...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 416}When my customers try to start a conversation with me, I never know what to say to 'em.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 416}The station workers always remind me to tell my customers to keep the station clean.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 416}Seems like there's a lot of littering going on these days... But I probably won't say anything.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 416}I ain't about to lecture my customers. If I did, no one would wanna ride in my cab.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 416}And the customer is always right, y'know? The station people don't care about us, anyway...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 416}Yeah. What can you do, y'know? Not like telling them to stop would change anything anyway.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 416}I saw the news... That monorail, huh? Coulda been bad...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 416}I'm in the same line of work, or near enough, so I got goosebumps when I saw that on TV...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 416}Do you know the takoyaki stand over there? It's some fine dinin'.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 416}Sometimes this kid from Kansai eats at that place, and even he says it's good stuff.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 416}Takoyaki comes from Kansai, so if a native says it tastes good, you better believe him![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 416}Whenever a passenger asks me where to get a bite to eat, I always send 'em over there.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 416}Usually, cabbies work night shifts. If I don't sleep during the day, when am I supposed to sleep?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 416}My wife gets steamed, saying we never talk anymore. She's got no idea what I'm going through![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 416}The other day, a passenger kept babbling about this weird stuff...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 416}Like some revenge website... I dunno.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 416}He was saying he's finally gonna get his revenge... I wonder if that site really exists.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 416}I got a complaint from a passenger. The guy called me "reticent, unsociable, and moody."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 416}But when I try to talk, they tell me to shut up! This job, I tell you...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 416}Now that it's summer vacation, I get a lot of younger passengers around midnight.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 416}People still talk about that revenge website thing, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 416}Is it that well-known around here?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 416}I know summer is the best time to release stress, but you've gotta use your common sense.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 416}These kids think the inside of my cab is a karaoke studio or something.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 416}Nah... It ain't my place to lecture somebody else's kid.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 416}And no matter how bad their manners stink, as long as they're on that seat, they're my customers.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 416}I don't really care how other people bring up their kids, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 416}I've got a daughter about that age, and I gotta wonder if she pulls that stuff on my coworkers...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 416}My daughter's a high school student, but she fell in with a bad crowd. I see her midnights on the job.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 416}My wife yells at me to tell her to cut that out, but kids her age... They'll never listen.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 416}I think I had that "Apathy Syndrome" thing... I took a few days off from work.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 416}The night shift is getting tough, and trying to talk to my passengers wears me out.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 416}I want to quit, but I can't... I've got a family to support...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 416}My coworker got into an accident. He's gotta wear a truss now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 416}I feel sorry for him. He can't work until his back heals, and there's no workman's comp for us cabbies.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 416}Ever since my coworker's accident, I've been more careful. I'm getting a bad reputation, though...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 416}Everyone says, "Step on the gas, man!" I tell you, this job...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 416}My daughter was arrested. They said she was ditching school to go shopping.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 416}I was so tired from my late shifts that I had to beg my wife to go get her instead...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 416}I wish they could understand what I'm going through and let me sleep at home...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 416}There was some drive to clean the stations up, but I don't think it's working here.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 416}There's trash all over, bicycles scattered on the floor... But I'm not complaining. I like it this way![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 416}Did you see those flyers? I heard a lot of people are buying into that stuff.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 416}Never underestimate the power of a piece of paper. I lost my family to a slip of paper...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 416}My wife left me... This damn cabbie job wasn't paying enough for me to take care of the family...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 416}Some cult is gonna save all of humanity? I wonder if they can save a lowly cabbie like me...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 416}I didn't realize how much my family meant to me until I lost 'em. All I want is to have them back...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 416}You think if I ask Nyx-sama or whatever, I'll get my family back...?[n]{f 1 1}
